source_title: The 8 Retrieval Benchmarks Lying to Your RAG
source_origin: Reddit r/Rag post referencing this article

extracted_concepts.name: Answerable@K
extracted_concepts.description: Replace 'did we find the doc?' with 'is there sufficient evidence in top-K to answer?'

extracted_concepts.name: Set-Based Relevance (Multi-Gold MRR)
extracted_concepts.description: Multiple docs can be correct; single-gold MRR penalizes valid alternatives

extracted_concepts.name: Chunk Completeness
extracted_concepts.description: Retrieved units may lack surrounding context (headers, exceptions, warnings)
extracted_concepts.reason_not_transferable: Shodh stores full memories not document chunks; context loss is minimal

extracted_concepts.name: Contradiction@K / Misleading-Context Rate
extracted_concepts.description: Measure how often wrong-but-plausible content appears in top-K results

extracted_concepts.name: Noisy Query Robustness
extracted_concepts.description: Clean benchmark queries != production; need typos, abbreviations, copy-paste artifacts

extracted_concepts.name: Freshness-Weighted Evaluation
extracted_concepts.description: Static test sets reward systems optimized for yesterday's data; need time-sliced eval

extracted_concepts.name: Permission-Filtered Recall
extracted_concepts.description: Post-ACL-filter recall collapse in enterprise RAG
extracted_concepts.reason_not_transferable: Personal memory system; no ACL/permission model

extracted_concepts.name: End-to-End Attribution
extracted_concepts.description: Retrieval success != answer success; measure grounding and faithfulness

new_boundaries.data_crossing: LOCOMO has 1 gold_memory_id per query; needs multi-gold set
new_boundaries.failure_mode: Underreporting true MRR - may already be better than 0.68

new_boundaries.data_crossing: valid_until field exists but never measured in benchmarks
new_boundaries.failure_mode: Contradictions detected at ingest but unknown if they leak into top-K

new_boundaries.data_crossing: Typo queries bypass stemmer, entity extraction fails on misspelled names
new_boundaries.failure_mode: Unknown robustness - clean MRR 0.88 could crater on noisy input

new_boundaries.data_crossing: Recency boost tuned globally but never measured per age-bucket
new_boundaries.failure_mode: Recency constants are blind-tuned; no data on per-temporal-band effect

new_boundaries.data_crossing: Retrieved memories go to judge but no explicit attribution scoring
new_boundaries.failure_mode: LongMemEval: 100% recall@3 but 20% QA accuracy - THIS is the gap

patterns.break_description: Detection without measurement - system level gap

patterns.module_level: feedback.rs tracks context fingerprints via Hebbian
patterns.break_description: Hebbian learns from it but eval ignores it

patterns.module_level: Pipeline adapts MMR lambda, CE blend, graph depth
patterns.system_level: LOCOMO eval does stratify per-type but lacks Answerable@K
patterns.break_description: Partial - stratification exists but evidence sufficiency metric missing
Tuned without feedback at eval level

spike_triggers.description: LongMemEval gap (100% recall@3, 20% QA accuracy) is EXACTLY C8 (retrieval benchmarks not including generator). Structural, not accidental.
Set-based MRR (C2) could revise LOCOMO MRR from 0.68 to 0.73-0.78 with multi-gold labeling. Changes optimization target.

overlook_pass.improvement_surface: Eval infrastructure, not retrieval pipeline. The pipeline is more capable than our benchmarks can measure.

application_map.estimated_delta: Reveals hidden failure rate; no MRR change but exposes contamination
MRR 0.68 -> 0.73-0.78 (multi-hop queries have multiple valid paths)

application_map.function: query perturbation: char-swap typos, remove articles, abbreviate, lowercase-only
application_map.estimated_delta: Expected 10-20% MRR degradation; entity extraction in analyze_query() will fail on misspelled names

application_map.function: eval stratification by memory age bucket: 0-7d / 7-30d / 30-90d / 90d+
application_map.estimated_delta: May reveal RECENCY_LOW_WEIGHT=0.1 buries correct old memories

application_map.function: add pre-question to judge: 'Given ONLY these memories, is there sufficient info to answer? (yes/no)'
application_map.estimated_delta: Directly quantifies LongMemEval gap (100% recall@3 -> 20% QA). If answerable@3=80%+ but correctness=20%, problem is generation not retrieval.

application_map.function: judge sub-prompt: 'Do any retrieved memories contradict the correct answer?'
application_map.estimated_delta: Surfaces hidden contamination in abstract queries (MRR 0.28 category)

key_insight: The improvement surface is in eval infrastructure, not the retrieval pipeline. Shodh already has contradiction detection, misleading tracking, temporal facts, and Hebbian feedback - but none of these are measured in benchmarks. Three fractal breaks exist where function-level and module-level mechanisms work correctly but system-level evaluation is blind to them. Fixing eval will either (a) reveal the pipeline is better than we think, or (b) expose specific failure modes we can target surgically.

verdict.primary_gap: Eval measures retrieval success but not answer success or contamination
verdict.secondary_gap: Robustness to noisy queries is completely unmeasured
verdict.recommended_sequence: E5 (Answerable@K) -> E4 (Freshness) -> E1 (Contradiction@K) -> E6 (Misleading) -> E3 (Noisy) -> E2 (Set-MRR)
